title: DSA Input Payload
description: Schema for the input payload sent by Trader to Daily Sales Analyst. Defines the contract for pipeline invocation.

date.description: Analyzed date in YYYY-MM-DD format (BRT business day)

mode.description: Execution mode controlling pipeline behavior and send permissions

package_path.description: Filesystem path to the Layer 0 data package JSON. Mutually exclusive with data_package.

data_package.description: Inline Layer 0 data package object. Mutually exclusive with package_path.

checks_summary.description: Optional human-readable summary of readiness checks

recipients_requested.description: List of recipients to generate reports for

prompt_version.description: Prompt version to use. 'current' for latest or explicit version like 'v3.0'

data_builder_version.description: Version of the Data Builder that produced the package, e.g. 'v1.0'

context_refs.description: Optional references to memory, rules, and external context

requested_by.description: Identifies the caller. Must always be 'Trader'.
